oai_response.prompt:
Here is code in Python 3 programming lanaguge. Translate the following code from Python 3 to C programming lanaguge. Do not output any extra description or tokens other than the translated code. 

n = int(input())
n+=1
while len(set(str(n)))<4:
    n+=1
print(n)    ||END-of-SRC||

source_data.prob_desc_input_spec: The single line contains integer y (1000 ≤ y ≤ 9000) — the year number.
source_data.source_code:
n = int(input())
n+=1
while len(set(str(n)))<4:
    n+=1
print(n)
source_data.prob_desc_output_spec: Print a single integer — the minimum year number that is strictly larger than y and all it's digits are distinct. It is guaranteed that the answer exists.
source_data.prob_desc_description: It seems like the year of 2013 came only yesterday. Do you know a curious fact? The year of 2013 is the first year after the old 1987 with only distinct digits.Now you are suggested to solve the following problem: given a year number, find the minimum year number which is strictly larger than the given one and has only distinct digits.
